# AI Studio Workspace

> Modern .NET/C# and Angular development environment with GitHub Copilot agents, skills, and OpenHands integration. Optimized for Gemini API (gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview).

## Overview
This workspace provides a complete development environment for .NET 8+, .NET 10, and Angular v20+ applications with AI-powered development tools including GitHub Copilot agents, OpenHands autonomous AI, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integration.

## Quick Start
```bash
# Build solution
dotnet build

# Run tests
dotnet test

# Start Docker services
docker-compose up -d

# Start OpenHands
./start.sh
```

## Key Documentation
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) - Build commands, coding conventions, and agent instructions
- [DESIGN.md](DESIGN.md) - Architecture principles, design patterns, and project structure
- [agents/AGENTS.md](agents/AGENTS.md) - Complete skills and rules guide
- [README.md](README.md) - Full project documentation
- [README.pt.md](README.pt.md) - Documentação em português

## Technology Stack
- **Backend**: .NET 8+, .NET 10, C# 12+, Entity Framework Core
- **Frontend**: Angular v20+, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- **AI/ML**: Gemini API (gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview), GitHub Copilot, OpenHands
- **Infrastructure**: Docker, Docker Compose, MCP (Model Context Protocol)
- **Testing**: xUnit, Vitest/Jasmine, Playwright

## Agent Skills
33 specialized skills for .NET development, Angular development, testing, architecture, and performance optimization. See [agents/skills/](agents/skills/) for complete list.

## MCP Integration
Model Context Protocol servers configured for filesystem, git, and database operations. See [mcp-config.json](mcp-config.json) for configuration.

## Directories
- [src/](src/) - Source code
- [tests/](tests/) - Unit and integration tests
- [agents/](agents/) - Skills and rules for AI agents
- [openhands/](openhands/) - OpenHands configuration and data
- [vscode/](vscode/) - VS Code/Windsurf settings and extensions
- [workspace/](workspace/) - Shared work area for Docker containers
- [runtime/](runtime/) - Docker runtime with .NET SDKs

## Build Commands
```bash
dotnet build              # Build solution
dotnet test               # Run tests
dotnet run --project src/MyProject  # Run application
docker-compose up -d      # Start Docker services
```

## Coding Conventions
- **C#**: PascalCase for classes/methods, camelCase for locals, _camelCase for private fields
- **Async**: Always use async/await, avoid .Result or .Wait()
- **Angular**: Standalone components with signals, OnPush change detection
- **API**: RESTful with proper HTTP verbs, DTOs for data transfer
- **EF Core**: NoTracking by default, split queries for navigation collections

## What Agents Must Not Touch
- Never modify generated files (bin/, obj/, node_modules/)
- Never change .gitignore or CI/CD configurations without explicit request
- Never modify secrets.json or .env files
- Never remove existing tests without replacement
- Never break backward compatibility without migration path

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/afonsoft/ai-studio-workspace)
- [Gemini API Documentation](https://ai.google.dev/docs)
- [GitHub Copilot Documentation](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot)
- [Model Context Protocol](https://modelcontextprotocol.io)
